decisions.title: Ship Explore V2 GA by March 31, 2026
decisions.context: Heavy focus on pre-GA cleanup: table improvements, amplitude event renaming, legend cleanup, downsampling UX. Need to decide if current quality bar meets GA threshold or if we slip.

arguments.for: Strong signal cluster around GA prep (ENG-9276, 9277, 9275, 9272). Most foundational work complete. March 31 deadline creates forcing function.
arguments.against: Still active work on core UX (channel list v2, text wrapping, context menus, fresh data reads). Risk shipping with known UX debt. No explicit 'GA readiness review' signal.

decisions.title: Prioritize K2 Mission data pipeline over other Canvas features
decisions.context: ENG-9104 (K2 data pipeline) appears alongside K8s readiness work (ENG-9254, 9179, 9174, 9175) and fresh data reads. Signals potential new customer/contract. Need to decide resource allocation vs Canvas backlog.

arguments.for: K2 Mission work spans infrastructure + data pipeline = likely high-value customer needing Sift Edge. Aligns with 'Embed Deeper' pillar. Security/compliance work (knox submissions) suggests enterprise deal.
arguments.against: Diverts engineering from Canvas core features (global nav prototypes, high-level data import). May delay broader Canvas adoption if we over-index on one customer.

decisions.title: Invest in Global Nav redesign now or defer post-GA
decisions.context: ENG-9126 and DES-135 show active UX prototyping and wireframing for Global Nav. This is foundational IA work that could disrupt current GA timeline if scoped large.

arguments.for: Early signals suggest navigation is confusing users. Better to fix IA before GA creates 'locked in' mental models. Prototyping phase = low risk exploration.
arguments.against: Global nav changes touch every surface. High regression risk 2 weeks before GA. Should validate current nav works 'well enough' and roadmap v2 for Q2.

decisions.title: Standardize downsampling UX across Explore V2 before GA
decisions.context: Multiple tickets around downsampling (ENG-9041 info exposure, ENG-8791 saved views, ENG-8790 per-channel config, ENG-9253 high refresh rate). Core to 'Signal>Evidence>Decision' - users need to trust what they see.

arguments.for: Downsampling directly impacts decision quality. If users don't understand what data they're seeing, North Star metric (Decisions Captured) suffers. Multiple tickets = known pain point.
arguments.against: Downsampling is advanced feature. GA can ship with 'good enough' defaults. Risk over-engineering UX that only 10% of users need. Focus on table stakes features first.

northStar.name: Decisions Captured Per Customer
northStar.delta: No direct signal in Linear tickets
